name: Impossible French Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------STREUSEL----------------------------------
Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease pie plate, 10" x 1 1/2".
Mix apples and spices in the pie plate.
Beat remaining ingredients except for Streusel until smooth (15 seconds in blender or 1 minute with hand beater). Pour into the pie plate. Sprinkle with Streusel.
Bake until knife inserted in centre comes out clean, 55-65 minutes; cool.
STREUSEL:
Mix 1 cup Bisquick, 1/2 cup chopped nuts, 1/3 cup packed brown sugar and 3 tablespoons firm Margarine or Butter until crumbly.
